description: Structured checklist for academic content validation

questions.question: Is the primary concept tag correct for this question?
questions.guidance: Check that the main mathematical concept being tested is accurately identified

questions.question: Are the prerequisites complete and appropriate?
questions.guidance: Verify all required prior knowledge is listed and no unnecessary prerequisites are included

questions.question: Is the difficulty level accurate for the target audience?
questions.guidance: Consider class level, JEE preparation stage, and cognitive load

questions.question: Is the question text clear and unambiguous?
questions.guidance: Check for confusing wording, multiple interpretations, or missing information

questions.question: Is the correct answer mathematically accurate?
questions.guidance: Verify the answer through independent calculation or reference

questions.question: Is the step-by-step solution mathematically correct?
questions.guidance: Check each calculation step for accuracy and logical flow

questions.question: Does the solution provide sufficient detail for learning?
questions.guidance: Students should be able to follow the reasoning without additional help

questions.question: Are the why-wrong explanations meaningful and helpful?
questions.guidance: Explanations should address common misconceptions and provide learning value

questions.question: Are the common mistake patterns accurate and relevant?
questions.guidance: Patterns should reflect actual student errors and include frequency estimates

questions.question: If present, is the rescue ladder pedagogically sound?
questions.guidance: Rescue questions should build appropriate scaffolding to the target concept

questions.question: Is the diagram necessary and useful for learning?
questions.guidance: Diagrams should add value beyond text explanations

questions.question: Is the learning objective clearly achievable through this question?
questions.guidance: Students should be able to demonstrate the intended learning outcome

questions.question: Is the learning objective appropriate for the difficulty level?
questions.guidance: Objectives should match cognitive development and prior knowledge

review_outcomes.approve: Content meets all academic standards and is ready for copyright review
review_outcomes.request_revision: Content needs minor revisions before proceeding
review_outcomes.reject: Content has significant issues requiring major rework
